_comment: #A7 per-character prompt presets. gen-char composes positive = (this char's `prompt`, if any) + the CLI prompt arg + ', <emotion> expression, ' + config.styleSuffix; negative = the workflow's base negative + config.negativeExtra + this char's `negative`. The preset is the STABLE identity (hair/outfit) so a character looks the same every gen; the CLI prompt adds per-gen detail (pose/action). With a preset you can pass an empty CLI prompt ('').

mali.prompt: thai teenage girl, auburn hair in a ponytail, pink hoodie, blue jeans

tao.prompt: thai teenage boy, short black hair, round glasses, green t-shirt, brown shorts

nurse.prompt: thai young woman nurse, white nurse uniform, dark hair tied in a bun, tired gentle face

mae.prompt: thai elderly woman, gray hair in a bun, floral blouse, kind wrinkled face
